title: Triage a review finding
summary: Classify a single review finding by severity and suggest a next action, with an explicit claim boundary.
body:
Given one review finding, output: { severity: stop_the_line|important|advisory, rationale, next_action }.

State the claim boundary: what your severity DOES and DOES NOT mean. Severity reflects review priority only — it is not a statement that the code is safe or unsafe to ship.
